created.title: Bundler
created.rawContent:
## Description

<!-- SECTION:DESCRIPTION:BEGIN -->
zerodev的bundler（ultrabundler？），modify version from pimlico的Alto，nodejs；
we should run a open source and permissionless bundler to provide permissionless gasless service.

enhance a close integration with AAStar infrastructure.

1. Accept standard ERC-4337 useroperation
2. Accept aPNTs and ETH to pay the service
3. Accept EIP-7702 request and be a relay server
4. Be any relay server with permission service
5. More feats inherited from ultrabundler
<!-- SECTION:DESCRIPTION:END -->

created.title: [Product] Cos72 - Cards, Points, Perks
created.rawContent:
## Description

<!-- SECTION:DESCRIPTION:BEGIN -->
A framework for user engagement and community incentives, featuring Cards, Points, and Perks.
<!-- SECTION:DESCRIPTION:END -->

## Acceptance Criteria
<!-- AC:BEGIN -->
- [ ] #1 Define Card structure,Implement Points system,Develop Perks distribution
<!-- AC:END -->

acceptanceCriteriaItems.text: Define Card structure,Implement Points system,Develop Perks distribution

created.description: A framework for user engagement and community incentives, featuring Cards, Points, and Perks.

updated.title: [Project] SuperPaymaster - Decentralized Gas Payment
updated.rawContent:
## Description

<!-- SECTION:DESCRIPTION:BEGIN -->
A decentralized Gas Payment Protocol enabling gasless transactions through credit and community sponsorship.
<!-- SECTION:DESCRIPTION:END -->

## Acceptance Criteria
<!-- AC:BEGIN -->
- [ ] #1 Implement Credit System,Add Operator Staking,Support Multiple Token Strategies
- [ ] #2 UUIP upgrade（评估透彻）
- [ ] #3 微支付改进支持
- [ ] #4 Refine and use ENS
<!-- AC:END -->

acceptanceCriteriaItems.text: Implement Credit System,Add Operator Staking,Support Multiple Token Strategies

updated.description: A decentralized Gas Payment Protocol enabling gasless transactions through credit and community sponsorship.

updated.title: [Feature] Comet ENS - Free Subdomain Service
updated.rawContent:
## Description

<!-- SECTION:DESCRIPTION:BEGIN -->
Provide users with free ENS subdomains (e.g., user.comet.eth) and internet domain mapping.
<!-- SECTION:DESCRIPTION:END -->

## Acceptance Criteria
<!-- AC:BEGIN -->
- [ ] #1 Deploy ENS resolver on Sepolia/OP,Support default subdomain allocation,Map internet domains to on-chain addresses
<!-- AC:END -->

## Definition of Done
<!-- DOD:BEGIN -->
- [ ] #1 .box 解析持续尝试
- [ ] #2 注册cv新域名，提供forest和自动解析功能
- [ ] #3 .zparty.eth自动解析
<!-- DOD:END -->

acceptanceCriteriaItems.text: Deploy ENS resolver on Sepolia/OP,Support default subdomain allocation,Map internet domains to on-chain addresses

definitionOfDoneItems.text: 注册cv新域名，提供forest和自动解析功能

updated.description: Provide users with free ENS subdomains (e.g., user.comet.eth) and internet domain mapping.

blockedTasks.title: [Feature] Sign90 - Smart Account Core
blockedTasks.rawContent:
## Description
Develop and deploy the foundational Smart Contract Account for Sign90.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Implement custom SCA with upgradability,Support 2/3 multi-sig logic by default,Compatible with ERC-4337 EntryPoint

acceptanceCriteriaItems.text: Implement custom SCA with upgradability,Support 2/3 multi-sig logic by default,Compatible with ERC-4337 EntryPoint

blockedTasks.description: Develop and deploy the foundational Smart Contract Account for Sign90.

blockedTasks.title: [Feature] Agent24 - Execution Loop
blockedTasks.rawContent:
## Description
Deploy the Agent24 autonomous execution engine: Info -> Decision -> Action.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Information gathering module (Oracles/Events),Decision making engine (Rule-based/LLM),Action execution via SCA

acceptanceCriteriaItems.text: Information gathering module (Oracles/Events),Decision making engine (Rule-based/LLM),Action execution via SCA

blockedTasks.description: Deploy the Agent24 autonomous execution engine: Info -> Decision -> Action.
